Line 358:  
Line 359:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 2969, 619, true);
Line 360:  
Line 361:  WriteLiteral(@"></div>
Line 362:  <style>
Line 363:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu {
Line 364:          display: block !important;
Line 365:      }
Line 366:  
Line 367:      .display_menu {
Line 368:          left: 65px;
Line 369:          overflow: visible;
Line 370:          position: absolute;
Line 371:          top: -5px;
Line 372:          background: #fff;
Line 373:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 374:          z-index: 100;
Line 375:      }
Line 376:  
Line 377:      .t-grid-content tr > td {
Line 378:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 379:          position: relative;
Line 380:      }
Line 381:  
Line 382:      .display_menu > ul {
Line 383:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 384:      }
Line 385:  
Line 386:      .display_menu li {
Line 387:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 388:          width: 143px;
Line 389:      }
Line 390:  </style>
Line 391:  <script");
Line 392:  
Line 393:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 2969, 619, true);

Line 408:  , 3645), false)

Line 414:  
Line 415:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 3674, 19, true);
Line 416:  
Line 417:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 3693, 23, true);
Line 418:  
Line 419:  WriteLiteral(" type=\"text/javascript\"");
Line 420:  
Line 421:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 3693, 23, true);
Line 422:  
Line 423:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 3716, 1228, true);
Line 424:  
Line 425:  WriteLiteral(@">
Line 426:      $(function () {
Line 427:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 428:          $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 429:              autoOpen: false
Line 430:          });
Line 431:          $('#popup').bind('dialogclose', function (event) {
Line 432:              window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 433:          });
Line 434:      });
Line 435:  
Line 436:      function CloseMe() {
Line 437:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('close');
Line 438:          //$("".t-icon .t-refresh"").trigger('click');
Line 439:  
Line 440:          window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 441:      }
Line 442:      function OpenEmailDialog(ac) {
Line 443:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 444:  
Line 445:          $.get(""/WrongContact/Index"", { accessCode: ac }, function (data) {
Line 446:  
Line 447:              $(""#EmailDialog"").html(data);
Line 448:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog({
Line 449:                  width: 1200,
Line 450:                  height: 1000,
Line 451:              });
Line 452:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog('open');
Line 453:          });
Line 454:      }
Line 455:      $('#menu_block').hover(function () {
Line 456:          // alert(""call"");
Line 457:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 458:      }, function () {
Line 459:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 460:      })
Line 461:  
Line 462:      $('#menu_block').mouseenter(function () {
Line 463:          $('#display_menu').show();
Line 464:      }).mouseleave(function () {
Line 465:  
Line 466:          $('#display_menu').hide();
Line 467:  
Line 468:      });
Line 469:  
Line 470:      function openEditPopup(id) {
Line 471:          $.get(""");
Line 472:  
Line 473:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 3716, 1228, true);
Line 474:  
Line 475:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 4945, 36, false);
Line 476:  
Line 477:              
Line 478:              #line 156 "C:\Users\john\Desktop\hs3MVC_Latest\Generic\Views\Questionnaire\FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml"
Line 479:            Write(Url.Content("~/Questionnaire/Edit/"));
Line 480:  
Line 481:              
Line 482:              #line default
Line 483:              #line hidden
Line 484:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 4945, 36, false);
Line 485:  
Line 486:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 4981, 732, true);
Line 487:  
Line 488:  WriteLiteral(@""" + id, function (data) {
Line 489:              $(""#genericPopup"").html(data);
Line 490:          });
Line 491:  
Line 492:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog({ height: 600, title: ""Edit/Correct"" });
Line 493:          $(""#genericPopup"").dialog('open');
Line 494:      }
Line 495:  
Line 496:      function openRemovePopup(id, name) {
Line 497:  
Line 498:  
Line 499:  
Line 500:          alertify.set({
Line 501:              labels: {
Line 502:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 503:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 504:              },
Line 505:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 506:          });
Line 507:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 508:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Remove : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 509:              if (e) {
Line 510:                  // Click no
Line 511:              } else {
Line 512:                  // click yes
Line 513:  
Line 514:                  $.get(""");
Line 515:  
Line 516:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 4981, 732, true);
Line 517:  
Line 518:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 5714, 39, false);
Line 519:  
Line 520:              
Line 521:              #line 182 "C:\Users\john\Desktop\hs3MVC_Latest\Generic\Views\Questionnaire\FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml"

Line 523:  
Line 524:              
Line 525:              #line default
Line 526:              #line hidden
Line 527:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 5714, 39, false);
Line 528:  
Line 529:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 5753, 746, true);
Line 530:  
Line 531:  WriteLiteral(@""" + id, function (data) {
Line 532:                      // $("".t-icon .t-refresh"").trigger('click');
Line 533:                      window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 534:                  });
Line 535:  
Line 536:              }
Line 537:          });
Line 538:  
Line 539:  
Line 540:      }
Line 541:  
Line 542:  
Line 543:      function openArchivePopup(id, name) {
Line 544:  
Line 545:  
Line 546:  
Line 547:          alertify.set({
Line 548:              labels: {
Line 549:                  ok: ""No"",
Line 550:                  cancel: ""Yes""
Line 551:              },
Line 552:              buttonFocus: ""cancel""
Line 553:          });
Line 554:          // button labels will be ""Accept"" and ""Deny""
Line 555:          alertify.confirm(""You are about to Archive : "" + name + "". Are you sure you want to do this?"", function (e) {
Line 556:              if (e) {
Line 557:                  // Click no
Line 558:              } else {
Line 559:                  // click yes
Line 560:  
Line 561:                  $.get(""");
Line 562:  
Line 563:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 5753, 746, true);

Line 565:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 6500, 39, false);

Line 580:                      window.location.replace(window.location.href);
Line 581:                  });
Line 582:  
Line 583:              }
Line 584:          });

Line 587:      }
Line 588:  
Line 589:      function openViewDetailPopup(id) {
Line 590:          $(""#genericPopup"").html(""<p>Loading Data...</p>"");
Line 591:          $.get(""");
Line 592:  
Line 593:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/FindQuestionnaireResult.cshtml", 6539, 340, true);

Line 609:  ";\r\n        $(\"#genericPopup\").dialog({ height: 600, title: \"View Detail\" });\r\n  " +
